name: Apify
description: Platform for web scraping, automation and web data extraction (actors, datasets, key-value stores, task scheduling and webhooks).

auth_methods.note: API v2 and Apify Cloud docs state authentication via API tokens passed as HTTP Authorization: Bearer <API_TOKEN>; docs also show an alternative apiKey query parameter (?token=<API_TOKEN>).

credential_access.note: API tokens are created in the Apify Console (Account → API tokens) with no mention of manual approval; pricing shows a Free plan, indicating developers can obtain and use tokens on a free tier subject to quotas.

api_surface.note: API v2 reference lists endpoints for actors, tasks, runs, users, storages, datasets, key-value stores, request queues, webhooks and more, indicating broad REST coverage of product objects.

buildability.note: Public REST API docs exist and API tokens can be self-generated on the Free plan, so integrations can be built immediately.

queries: Apify API v2 Authentication Authorization Bearer
Apify API tokens create Account → API tokens
Apify pricing Free Developer API access
Apify partners is API access partner-only
